Applying to 11000101
Input
I 0 = 1
I 1 = 1
I 2 = 0
I 3 = 0
I 4 = 0
I 5 = 1
I 6 = 0
I 7 = 1
Output
0 I 5 = 1
1 I 6 = 0
2 I 7 = 1
3 C 3n = NOT(1) = 0

5 I 1 = 1

7 I 3 = 0

\boxed{10101100}
